channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Domino's: Best Deal Ever: Any Pizza for $9.99
item.guid: Domino's-Best Deal Ever: Any Pizza for $9.99-2026-07-24
item.description: Get any pizza with any crust and any toppings, including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge, for $9.99 each at participating locations. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Arby's: $1.99 Sliders
item.description: Get any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations, available in-store and in the app for a limited time. (Limited time)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal
item.description: Score 20 boneless wings, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 — a strong value for a shareable spread. (Ongoing)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu
item.description: Choose from a rotating selection of value items including a chicken sandwich or chicken pieces with sides for just $5 at participating locations. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: McDonald's: McValue Menu: Items Under $3 Plus $5 Meal Deals
item.guid: McDonald's-McValue Menu: Items Under $3 Plus $5 Mea-2026-07-24
item.description: The McValue menu includes Sausage Biscuit, McDouble, McChicken, 4-piece Nuggets, and Small Fries under $3, with lunch and dinner meal deals starting at $5 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal
item.description: Build a meal your way for $5 daily at participating Burger King locations — a standing everyday value with no app required. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: The Luxe Cravings Box includes a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium drink for $5.99. (Ongoing)

item.title: KFC: $10 for 24-Piece Nugget Bucket
item.description: Score a 24-piece Chicken Nugget Bucket for $10 at participating KFC locations — a strong per-piece value for groups or families. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jimmy John's: Free Lemonade with Any Sandwich Today — Code SUMMERFRIDAY
item.guid: Jimmy John's-Free Lemonade with Any Sandwich Today — -2026-07-24
item.description: Use code SUMMERFRIDAY today, July 24, to get a free House-made Lemonade with any 8-inch sandwich or wrap order. (July 24, 2026)

item.title: Chipotle: Chipotle App Offers and Rewards
item.description: Check the Chipotle app for current limited-time digital offers including free-item promotions and seasonal deals; free account required. (Ongoing)
